{{Infobox group
| name = D’iss soldiers
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]] fought through ranks of D�iss soldiers.}}

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
